source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage, Crane/Other Lifting

context.region: Gulf of Mexico, High Island Area Block 110

actions_taken: Injured person diagnosed with fractures requiring surgery
W&T released internal alert to all decommissioning activities identifying dropped object hazard
BSEE recommended Safety Alert be issued
event.summary: On 27 June 2022 at approximately 12:15 P.M., a DHD Offshore Services welder was kneeling on a material barge deck welding support beams to secure a platform jacket when an estimated 2-foot by 4-foot by 3-inch slab of mud stuck to the platform jacket leg fell approximately 4 feet, landing on the welder's right leg and ankle. The welder sustained multiple fractures requiring surgery. The incident occurred during platform removal operations at HI Area Block 110 Lease G-02353.
recommendations: BSEE Lake Jackson District recommends the Office of Safety Management consider issuing a Safety Alert regarding the incident
Implement written procedures to remove debris from platform jackets prior to lifting and transport
Enhance hazard analysis processes to identify dropped object hazards during decommissioning activities

hazards.name: Lifting and transport of contaminated platform jacket
Personnel working in proximity to suspended or recently positioned loads

threats.name: Mud and debris release from platform jacket during or after lifting
Failure to identify dropped object hazard in work planning
Inadequate work area preparation and debris removal procedures

consequences.name: Personnel injury from dropped object impact
Lost time accident and medical treatment requirement
Regulatory violation and safety management system failure

controls.name: Job Safety Analysis (JSA) for platform removal operations
controls.barrier_role: Identify hazards including dropped objects prior to work execution

supporting_text: falling debris from the platform's jacket was not identified in the JSA
Inadequate hazard analysis, dropped objects from the platform's jacket were not identified as a hazard in the JSA

controls.name: Written procedure for debris removal from platform jacket
controls.barrier_role: Prevent accumulation and release of debris during lifting operations
controls.lod_basis: Operational procedure to eliminate hazard source

supporting_text: W&T stated they did not have a written procedure to remove debris from the platform's jacket

controls.name: Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) - Hard hat, safety gear
controls.barrier_role: Reduce severity of injury from dropped object impact
controls.lod_basis: Last line of defense to mitigate injury severity

supporting_text: during the incident the IP was wearing his required personal protective equipment

controls.name: Work Permit system for platform removal operations
controls.barrier_role: Authorize and control work activities with documented safety requirements

supporting_text: The AI requested Job Safety Analysis (JSA), Work Scopes, Procedures, Work Permits, weather conditions, photographs of the incident area and Witness Statements

controls.name: Management oversight and safety assurance for decommissioning activities
controls.barrier_role: Ensure work area safety and hazard management compliance

supporting_text: Management Systems -W&T failed to ensure work area was safe for welding operations
Lessee failed to provide for the safety of all personnel and take all necessary precautions to correct and remove any hazards

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
